feedback.text: Hello, I am also chiming in to help spread awerness about stop killing games. Currently there is one game that is precious to my heart, and that is StarCraft II. The possibility that Blizzard can just turn off the servers has already been slightly realised by the developer blocking community uploads to their arcade of community created content. This game is based on the original StarCraft which became a cultural phenomenon, predominantly in South Korea. Loosing this part of gaming history would leave the world a bit emptier. Thank you
